name: bulk_geolocate_ips
description: Look up geographic locations for multiple IP addresses in a single request. Accepts up to 50,000 IPs and returns an array of geolocation results. Bogon, private, and malformed IPs are skipped and not counted toward your quota.

parameters.name: ips
parameters.description: Array of IPv4 or IPv6 addresses to geolocate. Maximum 50,000 per request.

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of fields to include in each result. Passed as query parameter.

parameters.name: lang
parameters.description: Response language code. Passed as query parameter. Paid plans only.
